title: Khan Academy: Precalculus
description: Complete precalculus course covering trigonometry, complex numbers, vectors, and matrices. Perfect foundation before calculus.

title: Khan Academy: Calculus 1
description: Limits, derivatives, and integrals. Interactive exercises and videos covering single-variable calculus from the ground up.

title: Khan Academy: Calculus 2
description: Integration techniques, series, and parametric equations. Continuation of Calculus 1.

title: 3Blue1Brown: Essence of Calculus
description: Beautiful visual explanations of calculus concepts. Builds deep intuition about derivatives, integrals, and the fundamental theorem.

title: 3Blue1Brown: Essence of Linear Algebra
description: Visual, intuitive understanding of vectors, linear transformations, eigenvalues and more. Essential for advanced math.

title: MIT OpenCourseWare: Single Variable Calculus
description: Full MIT course with lectures, problem sets, and exams. Rigorous treatment of single-variable calculus.

title: MIT OpenCourseWare: Multivariable Calculus
description: Full MIT course covering partial derivatives, multiple integrals, vector calculus. Builds on single-variable calculus.

title: Paul's Online Math Notes: Calculus I
description: Comprehensive, well-organized notes covering limits, derivatives, and integrals with worked examples.

title: Paul's Online Math Notes: Calculus II
description: Integration techniques, sequences, series, parametric equations, and polar coordinates.

title: Paul's Online Math Notes: Calculus III
description: Three-dimensional space, vectors, partial derivatives, multiple integrals, and vector calculus.

title: Professor Leonard: Calculus 1 (Full Lectures)
description: Complete university calculus course recorded live. Detailed explanations with many examples.

title: Desmos Graphing Calculator
description: Free online graphing calculator. Essential tool for visualizing functions, derivatives, and integrals.

title: Symbolab: Step-by-Step Calculator
description: Shows step-by-step solutions for calculus problems including derivatives, integrals, and limits.

title: Brilliant.org: Calculus Fundamentals
description: Interactive, problem-based approach to learning calculus. Great for building intuition through doing.

title: Khan Academy: Algebra Basics
description: Foundation algebra skills needed before calculus. Variables, equations, functions, and graphs.

title: Khan Academy: Statistics & Probability
description: Descriptive statistics, probability, distributions, and inference. Useful complement to calculus.

title: MIT OCW: Linear Algebra (Gilbert Strang)
description: Classic MIT course by Gilbert Strang. Covers systems of equations, vector spaces, determinants, eigenvalues.

title: Wolfram Alpha
description: Computational knowledge engine. Solve equations, compute derivatives/integrals, and verify answers.

title: GeoGebra: Math Tools
description: Free, interactive math tools for graphing, geometry, algebra, calculus, and more.

title: Stewart Calculus: Early Transcendentals
description: The most widely used calculus textbook. Comprehensive coverage with excellent exercises.
